title: Electrical Engineering Consultancy
desc: Expert consultation for all electrical engineering needs feasibility studies, design review, and technical advisory services.

title: Power System Design
desc: End-to-end power system planning and design, including load analysis, single-line diagrams, and protection coordination.

title: Industrial Electrical Installations
desc: Full installation services for factories, warehouses, and industrial facilities — panels, conduit, motors, and control systems.

title: Power Distribution Systems
desc: Design and installation of low-voltage and medium-voltage distribution networks for reliable power delivery.

title: Electrical Maintenance & Repairs
desc: Scheduled and emergency maintenance for all electrical systems, ensuring maximum uptime and safe operation.

title: Energy Efficiency Solutions
desc: Audits, retrofits, and smart solutions that reduce energy consumption and lower operating costs for businesses.

title: Electrical Safety Inspections
desc: Comprehensive safety assessments, testing, and compliance reporting to meet national and international electrical standards.
